---
name: Bug report
about: Something is broken or behaving unexpectedly.
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What happened

A clear description of the behavior you observed.

## What you expected

A clear description of what you expected to happen.

## Reproduction

Minimal steps to reproduce:

1. ...
2. ...
3. ...

## Environment

- NEAT version: `npm view neat.is version` or `neat --version`
- Node.js version: `node --version`
- OS: macOS / Linux / Windows + version
- Project type: Next.js / Express / Fastify / Python / other

## Logs and snapshots

Paste relevant output. If `neat-out/graph.json` or `neat-out/errors.ndjson` is informative, attach a trimmed copy.

## Anything else

Other context, screenshots, theories.
